content.text: I'll read all four frames to judge cross-media continuity.
[Image: original 1280x3819, displayed at 670x2000. Multiply coordinates by 1.91 to map to original image.]

[{"ruleId":"V20","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"probe is amber in both video-02 (amber probe stem between oppose/agree) and page-01 (amber probe arrow in the circle diagram); candidates/data.observed is periwinkle in video-03 ('candidate' arrow) and page-01 (c1-c4 arrows); scores/meter/data.params is lilac purple in video-01 (score 0.86), video-03 (score 4.80, meter dial) and page-01 (the four score bars and their values 0.34/0.94/0.94/0.34). failureFlag rose pink in video-03 ('unearned win' triangle) matches the rose family. All shared concepts wear the same registry color across both media.","suggestion":"None; semantic color mapping is consistent across video and page."},{"ruleId":"V21","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Both media use only Night School palette: deep navy background, warm cream text/labels, periwinkle blue observed values, lilac purple params/scores/meter, amber probe, rose pink failure flag, mint green timestamps on page-01. No saturated out-of-palette primary red/green/blue observed in video-01/02/03 or page-01.","suggestion":"None; palette is disciplined in both media."},{"ruleId":"V22","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"video-01/02/03 and page-01 share the same deep-navy background, warm-cream serif typographic temperature, and monospace numeric styling; the diagrams (arrows, meter dial, score bars) read as the same product family with no jarring stylistic mismatch.","suggestion":"None; the two renderings read as one product."}]
